lessons.title: Defamation The Defamation Act 2009 and the Elements of the Tort
lessons.description: The elements of defamation under the 2009 Act are as follows.

lessons.title: Defamation Defences Under the 2009 Act
lessons.description: The first and most important defence is truth. Under section 16 of the Act, it is a complete defence to prove that the defamatory statement is true in all material respects.

lessons.title: Defamation Remedies and Practical Exam Application
lessons.description: In this short but exam-critical lesson, we are consolidating the remedies available in defamation and walking through how to approach a defamation problem question on the FE-1 paper.
